_comment: Species: Ink Bat (墨蝠) from Pursuit of the Truth. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Ink Bat

canonical.appearance: Bat 2 m wingspan, fur ink-black, sonar drains cultivation base
canonical.size: 2 m wingspan, 50 jin; ancient 8 m, 1000 jin
canonical.behavior: Cave swarm; hunts by sonar; cultivates in darkness
canonical.diet: cave insects, lost miners, weaker beasts
canonical.relationships: Swarm hunters; preyed upon by web weavers
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: ink_bat — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
